102101.Name: Rin·Izcorgiky
102101.Content: The Winter Dragon on the Floating Island. It is the embodiment of extreme frost, with power that can dim daylight and freeze all things. Now, the wind on the island begins to reverse, and ancient frost seeps from the rift. This is a sign of its impending revival.

102401.Name: Bone·Xiolotl
102401.Content: The Void Remnant Dragon on the Floating Island. Formed from pure Void Engram, it seems innately capable of devouring order and existence. Its very presence may be an unknown force eroding reality...

102701.Name: Light·Tonatiuh
102701.Content: The Daylight Dragon on the Floating Island. It is not a creature of the sky, yet it burns hotter than the sun. It is not a herald of doom, yet all things instinctively flee before it. As long as it soars beneath the sky, no shadow can find shelter.

102800.Name: Caprahorn - Bloom & Steel
102800.Content: Moonstrike and Sunfire were sovereigns of the same lineage. There was a clear succession order before the Illusory Blooms' erosion. After Moonstrike was parasitized by the Illusory Blooms, the original hierarchy collapsed. Sunfire sees it as a blight on their bloodline, while Moonstrike instinctively seeks to reclaim the old king's territory and power. Even when facing outside threats, they cannot set aside their hostility. This struggle for kingship matters more to them than any outsider.

102901.Name: Withered Bloomshard
102901.Content: It uses Engram as its cores, but the core has been overtaken by Hruga's will, causing the body to develop material traits similar to the Illusory Blooms.

103001.Name: Erosion Bloom Afterimage
103001.Content: A self-moving warplate left behind by the Bapharian Divines. Its original duty was to guard this Bapharian facility, but as time passed and the site became deserted, the warplate sank into silence. Now, its energy core has been parasitized by Illusory Blooms, yet it still retains its instinct to defend the facility, attacking any intruder without hesitation.
